case_title: SANDRA EVANS VS. TOMMY'S ORIGINAL MARGARITA, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, SANDRA DBA & ASSOCIATES SANDRA EVANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMMY'S ORIGINAL MARGARITA, INC. $2,774.34 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,824.34, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
